author: lOrm
content: #660 closed. Expanded SkillDefinition in src/skills.rs with when_to_use, argument-hint (kebab-case for CC compat), model, effort, paths (Vec<String>), hooks (loose Value to mirror CC), user-invocable (default true to preserve back-compat). serde aliases honor both snake_case and the CC-native kebab-case forms. 2 unit tests pin: extended frontmatter round-trip, default user_invocable behaviour.
